latestPost.text: The real bottleneck in scaling AI isn’t compute, it’s the network. AMD, with @OpenAI and @Microsoft, is contributing MRC to the Open Compute Project. Already deployed at scale in test clusters, not just on paper. Read more: https://www.amd.com/en/blogs/2026/amd-advances-ai-networking-at-scale-with-mrc.html

latestNews.title: Applied Digital (APLD) Brings 75 MW Online As Polaris Forge Valuation Debate Builds - simplywall.st

latestPost.text: Curious what it takes to build a AI Factory? This is the part most people never see. In Episode 3 of Behind the Build, The Space Between Design and Delivery, Applied Digital takes you behind the scenes of Polaris Forge 2, where construction continues while designs evolve in real time. See how our teams solve new challenges, adapt to changing tenant requirements, and keep projects moving without missing a beat. Watch Episode 3: https://youtu.be/i7nJDo2fgzc?si=xvlbTXQjIB8OYruM #BehindTheBuild #AIInfrastructure #DataCenters #APLD $APLD

latestPost.text: Why sell our majority interest in Abernathy? Opportunity cost.   Paul Prager joined Bloomberg to explain how TeraWulf’s Abernathy transaction reflects disciplined capital allocation: redeploying capital into scalable AI infrastructure opportunities where we control the site, the power, and the customer relationship. For $WULF, control matters. So does return on capital.
